data.title: Kalshi currently puts Trump's chance of being impeached again at 49%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Kalshi, a US financial trading and prediction market platform, currently expects the probability of US President Trump being impeached again to be 49%.

data.title: Trump Media & Technology Group files S-3 with total funding of approximately $2.3 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump Media Technology Group (DJT.O) submitted an S-3 registration statement for the previously announced Bitcoin asset transaction. The company said it was seeking registered investors to resell approximately 56 million shares and 29 million underlying convertible notes. The proceeds will be used to create Bitcoin assets and general corporate purposes. The S-3 form was submitted for the debt and equity subscription agreement signed with approximately 50 investors, with a total financing amount of approximately US$2.3 billion.

data.title: Former Trump adviser calls for Musk to be deported
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Steve Bannon, former senior adviser and chief strategist to US President Donald Trump, called for Musk to be deported after the US president and the billionaire had a spat on social media. "They should open a formal investigation into his (Musk's) immigration status because I firmly believe he is an illegal immigrant and he should be deported immediately," Bannon said in a telephone interview with The New York Times. He also urged the Trump administration to cancel all government contracts with Musk's companies and investigate his suspected drug use.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Releases Report on Major Trade Partners' Economic Policies
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Treasury Department has submitted its semi-annual report to Congress regarding the macroeconomic and foreign exchange policies of the United States' major trade partners. The report evaluates the policies of these partners over the four quarters ending in December 2024, which account for approximately 78% of U.S. foreign goods and services trade. The review concluded that none of the major trade partners manipulated their currency exchange rates with the U.S. dollar during this period. Currently, the Treasury's "monitoring list" of major trade partners includes nine economies, such as Japan, South Korea, Singapore, Vietnam, Germany, Ireland, and Switzerland.

data.title: Crypto Policy Heavyweights Back BRCA – Could Safe Harbor Spark a New Onchain Build-Out?
data.description:
Eight crypto policy groups, including Blockchain Association, Crypto Council for Innovation and DeFi Education Fund, have supported the BRCA and asked Congress to weave it into market-structure legislation, arguing blockchain software developers should not be regulated as money transmitters.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/policy-heavyweights-back-brca-safe-harbor-onchain-boom/

data.description:

data.title: WLFI issues cease and desist notice to creators of ‘Official Trump Wallet’
data.description:
World Liberty Financial (WLFI), the crypto venture associated with President Donald Trump and members of his family, has issued a cease-and-desist letter to the creators of a newly announced Trump-branded crypto wallet, Bloomberg News reported on June 5, citing a person familiar with the matter.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/wlfi-issues-cease-and-desist-notice-to-creators-of-official-trump-wallet/

data.title: Uber in ‘study phase’ of using stablecoins to transfer money globally
data.description:

The company is reportedly in the “study phase,” and is evaluating stablecoins as a cost-effective alternative to traditional payment systems for moving money across borders. Uber is aware of the potential […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uber-stablecoins-to-transfer-money-globally/

data.title: Why Circle Acquisition May Still Be A Good Bet For Ripple Despite IPO
data.description:
Today marks the debut of Circle IPO on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker CRCL. Investors clamored for shares: the IPO was oversubscribed 25 times, implying demand 25 times greater than available stock. That level of interest suggests a valuation near $7 billion
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/05/why-circle-acquisition-may-still-be-a-good-bet-for-ripple-despite-ipo/

Announced Thursday, the bridge enables both blockchains to verify each other’s transactions without relying on third-party custodians. The move allows Dogecoin holders to access Solana’s […]

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the total liquidation of the entire network reached 634 million US dollars, and long orders accounted for more than 95%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Coinglass data, the total amount of liquidation in the entire network reached 634 million US dollars in the past 4 hours, of which long positions were liquidated for 606 million US dollars and short positions were liquidated for 27.4918 million US dollars.
